members.name: Tracy
members.bio: I'm in love with plants!! Propagating and growing plants has always been my passion and it's so awesome to be able to do it as a business in our own backyard!

members.name: John
members.bio: I grew up around a grandmother who loved plants, and it just came natural for me. Propagating, growing and caring for the wonderful variety of plants that we have is awesome! This is a passion that we both share and is wonderful!!
